overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red jacket walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses sidewalks and crosswalks in a dense urban canyon with towering glass buildings, massive digital billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic on wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with corporate building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside the AVANT building, maintaining a consistent pace

entered.detail: tall corporate building with yellow horizontal stripes and illuminated signage reading AVANT
tall pole with speed limit sign showing 40 and traffic signal lights
multiple large digital screens displaying advertisements on building facades across the street
elevated pedestrian bridge or transit structure crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk bordered by the massive AVANT corporate building on the right and a busy multi-lane street on the left. Neon lights and digital billboards illuminate the wet concrete, reflecting the cyberpunk cityscape. The overhead walkway structure looms ahead as the character passes traffic infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with illuminated commercial signage

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk corridor into open intersection with wider visibility
crossing the multi-lane street at the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: stepping off the curb and crossing the wide intersection toward the MARCUS building area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow coat walking in the same direction across the crosswalk

entered.detail: large illuminated golden sign reading MARCUS on the building facade
commercial building with bright signage displaying CIRCUS in illuminated letters

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the character crosses the street. The MARCUS sign dominates the left side while the CIRCUS building becomes visible on the right. Other pedestrians are crossing in the same direction, and the ground transitions from sidewalk concrete to asphalt crosswalk with yellow tactile paving.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with entertainment venues and pharmacies

events.description: small yellow autonomous taxi drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the CIRCUS venue and approaching the PHARMACEUTICALS building

notable_agents.action: compact yellow autonomous taxi driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large green neon sign with medical cross symbol and PHARMACEUTICALS text

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the character passes the CIRCUS entertainment venue on the right. A small yellow autonomous taxi drives past on the adjacent street. The green neon PHARMACEUTICALS sign becomes prominent ahead, and the crowd density increases slightly with pedestrians walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station approach with NCART metro entrance

events.description: approaching the illuminated NCART station entrance with distinctive blue neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward the NCART transit station entrance with blue neon illumination

entered.detail: futuristic metro station entrance with bright blue neon lights and circular architectural elements

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the NCART transit station entrance, marked by distinctive blue neon lighting and futuristic architecture. The CIRCUS building falls behind as the PHARMACEUTICALS sign recedes into the distance. The street becomes less crowded as the character nears the station canopy and transit infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban canyon that transitions from a narrow corporate corridor into a bustling commercial intersection and finally toward a transit hub. It begins with the character walking along a narrow sidewalk beside the massive AVANT corporate building, where wet concrete reflects the glow of digital billboards and overhead walkways. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wide intersection, shifting from the sidewalk to an asphalt crosswalk dominated by the MARCUS sign and the emerging CIRCUS building. The camera then follows the character past the CIRCUS entertainment venue and a passing yellow autonomous taxi, moving toward a prominent green PHARMACEUTICALS sign amidst an increasing crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the environment clears as the character leaves the commercial district behind and approaches the blue neon lighting and futuristic architecture of the NCART transit station entrance.
